@@ -500,7 +500,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-73got","title":"Refactor beads-release formula to use gate step","description":"Update beads-release.formula.toml to use gate-based async for CI wait:

Replace the spin-wait `wait-ci` step with a proper gate step:

```toml
[[steps]]
id = "wait-ci"
title = "Await CI completion"
needs = ["push-tag"]
gate = "gh:run"
gate_hint = "release.yml"
timeout = "30m"
description = """
Gate step awaiting GitHub Actions release workflow.
Resolves automatically when workflow succeeds.
Escalates if workflow fails or times out.

No polling needed - Deacon patrol evaluates gates periodically.
"""
```

Depends on gate infrastructure being complete.

-{"id":"bd-74eak","title":"Review & merge PR #1026: fix(init) prevent init from worktrees","description":"Review and merge PR #1026: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/1026

## Summary
Prevents 'bd init' from running inside a git worktree. Worktrees should share the .beads database from the main repository.

## Changes
- Adds check in cmd/bd/init.go
- Error message guides users to use main repo or bd worktree create

## Review Checklist
- [ ] Pull the branch locally
- [ ] Run tests: go test ./...
- [ ] Verify the worktree check works correctly
- [ ] Merge with gh pr merge 1026 --repo steveyegge/beads --squash","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-11T18:14:05.979279-08:00","created_by":"beads/crew/emma","updated_at":"2026-01-11T18:14:05.979279-08:00"}

Review and merge PR #1026: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/1026

## Summary
Prevents 'bd init' from running inside a git worktree. Worktrees should share the .beads database from the main repository.

## Changes
- Adds check in cmd/bd/init.go
- Error message guides users to use main repo or bd worktree create

## Review Checklist
- [ ] Pull the branch locally
- [ ] Run tests: go test ./...
- [ ] Verify the worktree check works correctly

 {"id":"bd-74q9","title":"Issue to reopen with reason","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-11-22T14:57:44.493560585-05:00","updated_at":"2025-11-22T14:57:44.493560585-05:00","closed_at":"2025-11-09T16:13:23.938513-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-74w1","title":"Consolidate duplicate path-finding utilities (findJSONLPath, findBeadsDir, findGitRoot)","description":"Code health review found these functions defined in multiple places:

- findJSONLPath() in autoflush.go:45-73 and doctor/fix/migrate.go
- findBeadsDir() in autoimport.go:197-239 (with git worktree handling)
- findGitRoot() in autoimport.go:242-269 (Windows path conversion)

The beads package has public FindBeadsDir() and FindJSONLPath() APIs that should be used consistently.

Impact: Bug fixes need to be applied in multiple places. Git worktree handling may not be replicated everywhere.

Fix: Consolidate all implementations to use the beads package APIs. Remove duplicates.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-16T18:17:16.694293-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-22T21:13:46.83103-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-22T21:13:46.83103-08:00"}

 {"id":"bd-bdhn","title":"bd message: Add input validation for --importance flag","description":"The --importance flag accepts any string without validation, leading to confusing server errors.

**Location:** cmd/bd/message.go:256-258

**Fix:**
- Add flag validation for: low, normal, high, urgent
- Add shell completion support
- Validate in runMessageSend before sending

**Impact:** Better UX, prevents confusing errors","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-11-08T12:54:26.43027-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-08T12:57:59.65367-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-08T12:57:59.65367-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-bdhn","depends_on_id":"bd-6uix","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-11-08T12:55:54.910841-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"bd-be7a","title":"Create npm package structure with package.json","description":"Set up initial npm package structure for @beads/bd:

## Files to create
- npm/package.json - Package metadata, dependencies, scripts
- npm/bin/bd - CLI wrapper script that invokes native binary
- npm/.gitignore - Ignore downloaded binaries
- npm/README.md - Installation and usage instructions

## package.json structure
- Name: @beads/bd (scoped package)
- Main: index.js (exports binary path)
- Bin: bin/bd (CLI entry point)
- Scripts: postinstall (download binary)
- Keywords: issue-tracker, cli, beads, bd
- License: MIT

## Bin wrapper
Simple Node.js script that:
- Spawns native binary with child_process.spawn
- Passes through all arguments and stdio
- Exits with binary's exit code","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-02T23:39:47.416779-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-03T10:31:45.381258-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-03T10:31:45.381258-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-be7a","depends_on_id":"bd-febc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-11-02T23:40:32.923859-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
